# Function reference {.doc .doc-index}

## Core infrastructure

Base classes underlying all models.

| | |
| --- | --- |
| [core.PBModel](core.PBModel.qmd#paleobeasts.core.PBModel) | The overarching model structure for Paleobeasts.  |
| [core.PBOutput](core.PBOutput.qmd#paleobeasts.core.PBOutput) | Container for the results of one call to ``PBModel.integrate()``. |
| [core.Forcing](core.Forcing.qmd#paleobeasts.core.Forcing) | Unified forcing object for callables, time series arrays, and element sequences. |

## Climate models

Energy balance, ocean circulation, carbon cycle, and orbital-scale paleoclimate models.


| | |
| --- | --- |
| [EBM](EBM.qmd#paleobeasts.EBM) | Energy Balance Model (EBM) class |
| [Stommel](Stommel.qmd#paleobeasts.Stommel) | Minimal two-box Stommel thermohaline circulation model. |
| [Stocker2003BipolarSeesaw](Stocker2003BipolarSeesaw.qmd#paleobeasts.Stocker2003BipolarSeesaw) | Minimum thermodynamic model for the thermal bipolar seesaw. |
| [Daisyworld](Daisyworld.qmd#paleobeasts.Daisyworld) | Minimal 0D Daisyworld model with black/white daisy coverage and temperature. |
| [ENSORechargeOscillator](ENSORechargeOscillator.qmd#paleobeasts.ENSORechargeOscillator) | Jin-style ENSO recharge oscillator. |
| [Model3](Model3.qmd#paleobeasts.Model3) | Model 3 from Ganopolski (2024) describing glacial cycle evolution under orbital forcing. |

## Dynamical systems: Lorenz

Single-scale and two-scale Lorenz atmospheric models.

| | |
| --- | --- |
| [Lorenz63](Lorenz63.qmd#paleobeasts.Lorenz63) | Lorenz (1963) system. |
| [Lorenz96](Lorenz96.qmd#paleobeasts.Lorenz96) | Lorenz (1996) single-scale and two-scale atmospheric model. |

## Dynamical systems: Pendulums and oscillators

Mechanical oscillators ranging from simple SHM to chaotic driven pendulums.

| | |
| --- | --- |
| [SimplePendulum](SimplePendulum.qmd#paleobeasts.SimplePendulum) | Nonlinear pendulum with optional linear damping. |
| [DrivenPendulum](DrivenPendulum.qmd#paleobeasts.DrivenPendulum) | Driven damped pendulum in dimensionless form. |
| [DoublePendulum](DoublePendulum.qmd#paleobeasts.DoublePendulum) | Double pendulum — a conservative chaotic system. |
| [DampedSpring](DampedSpring.qmd#paleobeasts.DampedSpring) | Damped (and optionally driven) spring-mass oscillator. |

## Dynamical systems: Other attractors

Additional chaotic systems.

| | |
| --- | --- |
| [Roessler](Roessler.qmd#paleobeasts.Roessler) | Roessler chaotic oscillator. |

## Box model framework

Composable framework for building custom multi-reservoir models.

| | |
| --- | --- |
| [BoxModelSpec](BoxModelSpec.qmd#paleobeasts.BoxModelSpec) | Declarative specification for simple ODE box models. |
| [TwoBoxCarbon](TwoBoxCarbon.qmd#paleobeasts.TwoBoxCarbon) | Two-box carbon exchange model with explicit box volumes. |
